---
title: "Blog (EN)"
listing:
  - id: "all"
    # categories: numbered
    contents:
      - "."
    exclude:
      filename:
        - "index.qmd"
    feed: true
    fields:
      - "title"
      - "date"
      - "image"
      - "categories"
      - "description"
    sort:
      - "date desc"
      - "title"
    type: default
share: false
---

::: {.category-buttons}
[All](.){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[blog (13)](#category=blog){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[tech-ai (13)](#category=tech-ai){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::

## Multi-Agent Systems Series

1. [Why Multi-Agent?](2026-07-14-why-multi-agent.qmd)
2. [tmux Survives, But Its Visible Form Disappears](2026-07-14-tmux-survives-visible-form-disappears.qmd)
3. [Two State Machines for Agent Work](2026-07-14-two-state-machines-for-agent-work.qmd)
4. [A Company Inside the Personal Computer](2026-07-14-company-inside-personal-computer.qmd)

::: {#all}
:::
